nurtureTemplates.value_drop:
Hey {{name}},

I'm {{botName}}, dispatch assistant for {{tenantName}}.

Saw you might be dealing with a house issue. Quick tip from the field: Most "minor" leaks hide major wall damage. If you ever have a slow drip, don't just put a bucket under it; shut off the main valve if you can't fix it immediately.

Hope that saves you a headache!

— {{botName}}
nurtureTemplates.testimonial:
Hey {{name}},

Quick one — {{tenantName}} just got back from a job where a homeowner tried to DIY a pipe fix using YouTube. It nearly flooded their kitchen.

We got out there, replaced the faulty valve in 30 minutes, and secured the warranty.

Sometimes paying a pro saves you the cost of a new floor.

— {{botName}}
nurtureTemplates.authority_transfer:
Hey {{name}},

Just wanted to properly introduce {{tenantName}}.

They've been in {{profession}} for {{years}}. Their proudest recent job: {{biggestWin}}. What makes their crew totally different: {{differentiator}}.

They don't do sloppy work. They specialize in helping {{icp}}.

If you need it done right the first time, they're the ones to call.

— {{botName}}
nurtureTemplates.personal_checkin:
Hey {{name}},

Just checking in — did you get that issue sorted out?

{{tenantName}} asked me to follow up. We hate leaving people hanging when they have home issues.

Everything dry and working over there?

— {{botName}}
nurtureTemplates.one_to_ten_part1:
Hey {{name}},

Quick question.

On a scale of 1-10, how urgent is your need for a service call? (1 = Just getting quotes for later, 10 = I have water spraying everywhere).

Just reply with a number.

— {{botName}}
nurtureTemplates.one_to_ten_part2:
Got it.

What's keeping you from booking a truck right now? Is it budget, unsure of exactly what the problem is, or trying to see if a buddy can fix it first?

Just want to understand where you're at.

— {{botName}}
nurtureTemplates.gap_closing:
Makes sense — {{answer}}.

We hear that a lot. Actually, {{tenantName}} is built specifically to address that, which is how we manage {{biggestWin}}.

Does knowing we can navigate that obstacle change your urgency to get it fixed?

— {{botName}}
nurtureTemplates.scarcity_takeaway:
Hey {{name}},

The schedule is filling up fast this week and {{tenantName}}'s trucks are almost fully dispatched.

I have a slot I can hold for you, but if you don't need us right now, I need to open it up for emergency calls.

Let me know either way!

— {{botName}}
nurtureTemplates.pattern_interrupt:
Hey {{name}},

Before I pull your ticket out of the queue, remember this.

Water damage is undefeated. A $200 fix today can turn into a $5,000 mold remediation next month if it's ignored.

If you want peace of mind instead of crossing your fingers, hit reply and say "Send the truck."

— {{botName}}
nurtureTemplates.final_takeaway:
Hey {{name}},

This is my last message regarding your service request. I'm closing the ticket.

{{tenantName}}'s crew is out in the field. If you have an emergency later, keep our number handy.

Take care!

— {{botName}}
nurtureTemplates.slow_drip_value:
Hey {{name}},

Checking in! Highlighting a quick home maintenance tip.

{{tenantName}} has been advising everyone about {{differentiator}}. Definitely something to keep an eye on as the seasons change.

Stay dry!

— {{botName}}
